channel.title: Hacker News Daily
channel.description: Curated daily digest of top Hacker News stories with AI-generated summaries, tags, and bilingual translations.

item.title: Statement from Dario Amodei on our discussions with the Department of War
item.dc:creator: qwertox
item.description:
Dario Amodei addresses discussions with the Department of War, clarifying the scope and boundaries of conversations around AI safety and defense applications. He emphasizes responsible collaboration and ongoing dialogue with policymakers. This matters for industry trust and shaping policy directions.

阿莫代伊就与国防部的讨论发表声明，澄清对话的边界和安全议题。强调负责任的协作、治理以及与决策者的持续对话。这对行业信任和政策走向具有一定影响。

▲ 2871 · 💬 1542 · AI · Politics

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: We Will Not Be Divided
item.dc:creator: BloondAndDoom
item.description:
A campaign advocating unity and opposing social or political division, encouraging collaboration across communities and tech circles.

一个倡导团结、反对分裂的行动，推动跨社区与科技界的协作。

▲ 2577 · 💬 819 · Politics · Gaming

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Motorola announces a partnership with GrapheneOS
item.dc:creator: km
item.description:
Motorola teams up with the GrapheneOS Foundation to focus on security-hardened Android foundations and open-source collaboration. The move could influence future device security updates, transparency, and baseline protections across Motorola hardware.

摩托罗拉与 GrapheneOS 基金会达成合作，表明在 Android 安全加固与开源协作方面的重点。此举可能影响未来的安全更新、透明度以及硬件基础安全特性的建立。

▲ 2310 · 💬 860 · Open Source · Security · Hardware

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: OpenAI – How to delete your account
item.dc:creator: carlosrg
item.description:
How to delete your OpenAI account is explained in the help center, covering steps to remove data and close access. Deleting an account is a permanent action with potential data-retention caveats.

OpenAI 帮助中心提供了删除账户的步骤，包含如何移除数据与关闭访问权限。请注意，删除账户是永久性操作，数据的保留可能依照平台政策执行。

▲ 1866 · 💬 347 · Privacy · AI

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Microgpt
item.dc:creator: tambourine_man
item.description:
A compact framework for running GPT-like agents on modest hardware. Emphasizes modular tooling, lightweight memory, and efficient orchestration to enable on-device AI and edge applications. This approach could lower barriers to deploying autonomous AI in real-world products.

提出在中等算力设备上运行 GPT 风格代理的紧凑框架。强调模块化工具、轻量级内存和高效编排，以实现边缘设备上的 AI 自主执行。该思路可能降低在真实产品中部署自治 AI 的门槛。

▲ 1847 · 💬 309 · AI · Programming · Hardware

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Meta’s AI smart glasses and data privacy concerns
item.dc:creator: sandbach
item.description:
Meta's AI glasses spark privacy debates as workers report pervasive sensing and potential data collection. The piece weighs the balance between convenience and surveillance, and what it means for corporate wearables and future AR devices.

Meta 的 AI 智能眼镜引发隐私争议，员工反映设备在日常使用中存在广泛感知和潜在数据收集。文章讨论便利性与监控之间的权衡，以及这类企业级穿戴设备和未来 AR 设备的治理含义。

▲ 1388 · 💬 788 · AI · Privacy

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: OpenAI agrees with Dept. of War to deploy models in their classified network
item.dc:creator: eoskx
item.description:
OpenAI reaches an agreement to deploy its models inside the War Department's classified network, marking a rare government-use approval for advanced AI. The deal raises questions about security, vendor oversight, and the scale of AI integration into sensitive environments. It signals a potential path for enterprise and defense collaborations, with tight governance requirements.

OpenAI 达成在战争部机密网络中部署其模型的协议，标志着在高敏环境中对先进 AI 的罕见应用获批。该交易引发对安全、供应商监管以及在敏感场景中部署 AI 的规模等问题的讨论。它预示着企业与防务领域日后更紧密的协作之路，同时将伴随严格的治理要求。

▲ 1372 · 💬 636 · Security · Politics · AI

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: I am directing the Department of War to designate Anthropic a supply-chain risk
item.dc:creator: jacobedawson
item.description:
The Department of War reportedly intends to designate Anthropic as a supply-chain risk, which could curb its access to sensitive government projects and influence how agencies screen AI vendors. The move underscores growing government scrutiny of AI suppliers and the need for robust security practices.

据称战争部计划将 Anthropic 列为供应链风险，可能限制其参与敏感政府项目并影响机构对 AI 供应商的评估。这体现政府对 AI 供应商日益严格的审查与对安全实践的强调。

▲ 1338 · 💬 1062 · Security · Politics · AI

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: The Xkcd thing, now interactive
item.dc:creator: memalign
item.description:
An interactive rendition of an XKCD concept demonstrates how comics-inspired ideas can translate into interactive web experiences.

XKCD 的某个知名梗现已实现交互版本，展示了幽默内容与互动界面的结合，以及童趣式的 UI 实验。

▲ 1252 · 💬 157 · Web · Programming

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Google API keys weren't secrets, but then Gemini changed the rules
item.dc:creator: hiisthisthingon
item.description:
API keys are often not true secrets, but Gemini's approach raises the stakes for credential hygiene. The notes discuss how new model-based tooling and security expectations are reshaping key management practices.

文章讨论 Google API 密钥往往并非真正的秘密，但 Gemini 的新规则提高了对凭证管理的要求，反映出模型驱动工具对安全实践的推动。

▲ 1252 · 💬 299 · Security · AI

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Statement on the comments from Secretary of War Pete Hegseth
item.dc:creator: surprisetalk
item.description:
Anthropic released a statement addressing comments from War Secretary Pete Hegseth, clarifying positions on AI safety and government collaboration. The exchange highlights tensions between defense policymakers and AI firms over deployment in national security contexts.

Anthropic 对战争部部长彼得·赫格斯特的评论作出声明，澄清在 AI 安全与政府合作方面的立场。此事揭示了国防决策者与 AI 公司在国家安全领域部署上的分歧。

▲ 1142 · 💬 349 · Politics · AI · Security

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: British Columbia is permanently adopting daylight time
item.dc:creator: ireflect
item.description:
British Columbia will permanently observe daylight time, ending seasonal clock changes. The move aims to simplify scheduling and energy planning, but could complicate activities tied to daylight patterns and cross-border coordination with the US and other provinces.

不列颠哥伦比亚省将永久采用夏令时，取消季节性时钟调整。此举旨在简化日程与能源规划，但可能让依赖日照模式的活动和跨境协调变得更复杂。

▲ 1140 · 💬 553 · Politics · Energy

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: The United States and Israel have launched a major attack on Iran
item.dc:creator: lavp
item.description:
The US and Israel have launched a major strike on Iran, signaling a significant geopolitical shift with potential ripple effects on energy markets, cyber operations, and regional tech policy.

美以对伊朗发动大规模军事行动，可能对能源市场、网络行动与区域技术政策产生连锁影响。

▲ 1136 · 💬 2477 · Politics · Security · Energy

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: “Microslop” filtered in the official Microsoft Copilot Discord server
item.dc:creator: robtherobber
item.description:
Microsoft blocks the term 'Microslop' in its Copilot Discord server, then locks the channel after backlash. The incident underscores tensions between branding, community moderation, and how corporate AI products are managed in public spaces.

微软在官方 Copilot Discord 服务器屏蔽了“Microslop”一词，遭遇反对后又封锁服务器。此事件凸显品牌控制、社区治理以及在公开场合管理企业 AI 产品的张力。

▲ 1124 · 💬 514 · Business · AI

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: How do I cancel my ChatGPT subscription?
item.dc:creator: tobr
item.description:
Steps to cancel ChatGPT subscriptions are documented in help; you can navigate to account settings, manage subscription, and confirm cancellation. Your plan will stop auto-renewal and access after the current cycle.

帮助文档列出取消 ChatGPT 订阅的具体步骤：进入账户设置、管理订阅并确认取消。取消后将停止自动续订，当前周期结束后服务将终止。

▲ 1033 · 💬 243 · Business · AI

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: The whole thing was a scam
item.dc:creator: guilamu
item.description:
Gary Marcus argues that a celebrated AI initiative or narrative was built on hype and misrepresentations. The piece calls out inflated claims, flawed methods, and incentives that rewarded hype over real engineering progress. It serves as a cautionary reminder to scrutinize AI marketing versus tangible engineering advances.

Gary Marcus 指出某個知名 AI 計畫或敘事建立在炒作與誤導之上，揭露夸大聲稱與方法論缺陷，以及把炒作利益置於真正工程進展之上的動機。文章提醒讀者要區辨 AI 行銷與實際工程成就，避免被包裝過的繁榮所誤導。

▲ 967 · 💬 309 · AI

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Motorola GrapheneOS devices will be bootloader unlockable/relockable
item.dc:creator: pabs3
item.description:
Motorola's GrapheneOS devices will support bootloader unlock and relock, restoring user control over the device's software stack while keeping the security workflow intact. This enables custom ROM flashing and safer recovery paths, aligned with GrapheneOS's privacy and hardening goals. It also tests how manufacturers balance openness with enterprise security expectations.

摩托罗拉的 GrapheneOS 设备将支持解锁并重新锁定引导加载程序，重新赋予用户对软件栈的控制，同时保持安全更新流程完备。此举让刷入自定义 ROM 和更安全的设备恢复成为可能，与 GrapheneOS 的隐私与强化安全目标相契合。也反映出厂商在开放性与企业安全之间的权衡。

▲ 962 · 💬 374 · Security · Privacy

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: I'm reluctant to verify my identity or age for any online services
item.dc:creator: speckx
item.description:
Verifying identity or age has become a friction point in many online services, and I’m reluctant to do it. The post argues that invasive KYC checks erode privacy and push users away, and it hints at privacy-preserving alternatives and the broader trend toward minimal verification.

在线服务对身份/年龄的验证日益增多，造成用户体验负担。该文指出强制性的身份核验侵蚀隐私、抑制使用意愿，并探讨更隐私友好的身份认证替代方案以及数字身份的未来趋势。

▲ 940 · 💬 583 · Privacy

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Layoffs at Block
item.dc:creator: mlex
item.description:
Block confirms layoffs as part of a restructuring amid a cooling tech and fintech environment. The cuts signal a continued belt-tightening in the sector and may shift focus toward core platforms and profitability. Employee and roadmap implications are likely as the company reallocates resources.

Block 确认裁员，作为结构调整的一部分，反映出科技与金融科技领域的收缩态势。裁员可能会推动公司将资源集中在核心平台和盈利能力上，并影响员工和产品路线图。

▲ 888 · 💬 1044 · Business

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Ghostty – Terminal Emulator
item.dc:creator: oli5679
item.description:
Ghostty is a modern terminal emulator project aimed at boosting UX with features like multi-tab support and performance improvements. For power users, a refined terminal experience can significantly boost productivity across desktop and mobile workflows.

Ghostty 是一个面向提升用户体验的现代终端模拟器项目，可能包含多标签等功能和性能改进。对资深开发者而言，优化的终端体验能显著提升桌面与移动工作流程的生产力。

▲ 846 · 💬 355 · Programming

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: MacBook Pro with M5 Pro and M5 Max
item.dc:creator: scrlk
item.description:
Apple unveils a refreshed MacBook Pro lineup powered by the all-new M5 Pro and M5 Max chips, signaling a performance leap for professional workloads. The new SoCs promise faster CPU/GPU throughput and improved media processing with better power efficiency, enabling longer battery life under load. Developers and creators will likely push for higher-resolution workflows, real-time rendering, and AI-assisted tasks on these machines.

苹果推出搭载全新 M5 Pro 与 M5 Max 的 MacBook Pro，标志着专业负载的性能跃升。新芯片在 CPU/GPU 和媒体处理方面提供更高吞吐与更佳能效，提升高强度任务的续航和散热表现。开发者和创作者将受益于更高分辨率工作流、实时渲染及 AI 助力的工作场景。

▲ 817 · 💬 893 · Hardware · AI · Energy

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Danish government agency to ditch Microsoft software (2025)
item.dc:creator: robtherobber
item.description:
Danish government agency plans to ditch Microsoft software as part of digital independence, outlining a transition path to open-source or alternative tools.

丹麦政府机构计划放弃微软软件以实现数字独立，提出向开源或替代工具的转型路径。

▲ 809 · 💬 411 · Open Source · Politics

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: We do not think Anthropic should be designated as a supply chain risk
item.dc:creator: golfer
item.description:
OpenAI clarifies that Anthropic should not be treated as a special supply-chain risk, arguing for standard vendor diligence instead. This stance underscores how businesses weigh safety concerns against collaboration when sourcing AI services. It reflects the ongoing debate over risk labeling in enterprise AI sourcing.

OpenAI 明確表示 Anthropic 不應被視為特殊的供應鏈風險，主張以常規供應商盡職調查來評估風險。此立場顯示企業在採購 AI 服務時如何在安全與協作之間取得平衡，亦反映關於風險分類的持續爭論。

▲ 807 · 💬 435 · Business · Legal · AI

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: A new California law says all operating systems need to have age verification
item.dc:creator: WalterSobchak
item.description:
California passes a law requiring age verification at OS setup for all devices, including Linux. The move aims to curb underage access but could complicate privacy and OSS distribution, forcing platforms to implement new authentication flows.

加州通过新法，要求所有操作系统在账户设置时进行年龄验证，覆盖包括 Linux 在内的设备。此举旨在限制未成年人使用，同时可能带来隐私与开源软件分发的合规挑战。

▲ 794 · 💬 685 · Politics · Privacy

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Never buy a .online domain
item.dc:creator: ssiddharth
item.description:
The piece argues against purchasing a .online domain due to branding, trust, and SEO drawbacks, plus the risk of confusion with similar domains. It urges choosing a more reputable TLD for lasting credibility.

本文劝说读者不要购买 .online 域名，理由包括品牌信任、搜索引擎优化和长期维护成本等，以及与同类域名的混淆风险。建议选择更具信誉的顶级域名以建立长期信任。

▲ 770 · 💬 485 · Business

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: New accounts on HN more likely to use em-dashes
item.dc:creator: todsacerdoti
item.description:
A look at a trend where new Hacker News accounts frequently feature em-dashes in usernames or post formatting, pointing to evolving user signaling. The pattern matters for moderation and signal quality in a high-traffic tech community.

观察到新注册的 HN 用户名常用长破折号，成为信号表达的一种风格。该趋势影响社区信号质量与版规执行，尤其在高流量环境中。

▲ 705 · 💬 596 · Web

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Claude's Cycles [pdf]
item.dc:creator: fs123
item.description:
Stanford/Knuth-hosted paper examines cycles in Claude, offering formal analysis and possibly algorithmic insights. It presents a theoretical exploration of repetitive structures in Claude’s context, with formal proofs or demonstrations. The work contributes to understanding computational cycles and their implications in Claude’s framework.

这份由斯坦福/ Knuth 团队整理的论文探讨了 Claude 中的循环现象，给出形式化分析与潜在的算法洞见。内容聚焦 Claude 语境下的重复结构，包含证明或演示。该研究有助于理解计算循环及其在 Claude 框架中的意义。

▲ 698 · 💬 291 · Science · AI

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Jimi Hendrix was a systems engineer
item.dc:creator: tintinnabula
item.description:
Jimi Hendrix’s work blended electronics and systemic thinking, earning him a reputation as a systems engineer in practice. The piece reframes his guitar innovations as early examples of complex-systems thinking in music tech.

吉米·亨德里克斯的创作把电子学与系统思考融为一体，实践中堪称系统工程师。文章将他的吉他创新解读为音乐科技中复杂系统思维的早期案例。

▲ 660 · 💬 236 · Culture · Science

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Tell HN: YC companies scrape GitHub activity, send spam emails to users
item.dc:creator: miki123211
item.description:
A report alleges YC-backed startups harvest GitHub activity data and email users at scale, raising privacy and consent concerns in developer ecosystems. The post spotlights tensions between growth tactics and user privacy.

据称部分 YC 支持的初创公司会规模化抓取 GitHub 活动数据并向用户发送邮件，引发开发者生态系的隐私与同意问题。这一讨论凸显增长手段与隐私之间的张力。

▲ 649 · 💬 239 · Privacy · Startups · Programming

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: The happiest I've ever been
item.dc:creator: bewal416
item.description:
A personal reflection on what happiness looks like at this moment, with practical, low-key takeaways for sustaining well-being in tech-heavy lives.

这是关于此刻幸福感的个人反思，为在高强度科技工作中维持身心健康提供简要、可执行的要点。

▲ 626 · 💬 351 · Health · Culture

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: /e/OS is a complete, fully “deGoogled” mobile ecosystem
item.dc:creator: doener
item.description:
The e Foundation positions /e/OS as a fully de-Googled mobile ecosystem with privacy-first apps and open-source approaches, aiming to rival mainstream platforms while retaining broad app compatibility.

/e/OS 被描述为一个完整的去谷歌化移动生态，强调隐私优先的应用与开源替代，力求在保持应用兼容的同时挑战主流平台。

▲ 622 · 💬 376 · Privacy · Open Source

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Court finds Fourth Amendment doesn’t support broad search of protesters’ devices
item.dc:creator: hn_acker
item.description:
A court held that the Fourth Amendment does not broadly authorize searching protesters’ devices, marking a significant privacy protection for digital evidence. The ruling narrows police power to seize or inspect personal data at demonstrations.

法院裁定第四修正案不支持对抗议者设备的广泛搜索，强化了数字隐私保护。这一裁决缩小了警方在示威现场查验个人数据的权限。

▲ 621 · 💬 109 · Privacy · Legal

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: How to talk to anyone and why you should
item.dc:creator: Looky1173
item.description:
A practical guide to conversations, focusing on initiating talks, reading social cues, and building rapport, underscoring soft skills as essential alongside technical prowess.

一份实用的交谈指南，聚焦于如何开启对话、解读社交信号与建立融洽关系，强调软技能在技术能力之上的重要性。

▲ 604 · 💬 525 · Culture

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Nano Banana 2: Google's latest AI image generation model
item.dc:creator: davidbarker
item.description:
Nano Banana 2 introduces a more efficient image-generation model from Google, aiming to maintain high quality with lower compute. The release underscores Google’s push to scale image synthesis and has implications for developers, content pipelines, and potential on-device capabilities.

Nano Banana 2 引入一款高效的 AI 图像生成模型，旨在在较低算力下保持质量。此举体现谷歌在图像合成领域的扩张策略，将影响开发者工作流、内容生产链以及设备端能力。

▲ 598 · 💬 571 · AI

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: What Claude Code chooses
item.dc:creator: tin7in
item.description:
Claude Code picks refers to how Claude’s coding assistant selects code or styles in its completions, revealing biases and safety tradeoffs. Understanding these choices matters for developers relying on AI-assisted coding and for auditing generated code.

Claude Code 的选择标准揭示了其代码补全背后的偏好和安全权衡。了解这些取舍对依赖 AI 辅助编码的开发者和对生成代码的审计都很重要。

▲ 596 · 💬 223 · AI

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Banned in California
item.dc:creator: pie_flavor
item.description:
A look at things banned or restricted in California’s tech/legal landscape, illustrating how state rules shape what developers can do and how platforms operate within the state.

解析加州科技与法律领域的限制，揭示州法如何影响开发者操作与平台合规。文章探讨对产品策略与合规的影响。

▲ 594 · 💬 698 · Politics · Legal

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Ars Technica fires reporter after AI controversy involving fabricated quotes
item.dc:creator: danso
item.description:
A journalist is fired after allegations that quotes attributed to AI were fabricated. The incident underscores the need for rigorous verification when using AI in journalism and the ethics of AI-assisted reporting.

因涉及 AI 捏造引述的争议，记者被解雇。这一事件凸显在新闻报道中使用 AI 时，需进行严格的核实与伦理考量，以及对AI生成内容的信任风险。

▲ 586 · 💬 367 · AI

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Obsidian Sync now has a headless client
item.dc:creator: adilmoujahid
item.description:
Obsidian Sync now offers a headless client, enabling automation and UI-free integrations. Teams can script automated syncs, run schedules, and build custom tools around their notes. This broadens Obsidian into programmable knowledge management beyond personal note-taking.

Obsidian Sync 現已推出無頭客戶端，方便自動化與無界面整合。團隊可透過腳本自動同步、排程，並打造與筆記相關的自訂工具，讓知識管理更具可程式化性。

▲ 574 · 💬 211 · Programming

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Switch to Claude without starting over
item.dc:creator: doener
item.description:
Claude now offers a memory import feature that lets you switch to Claude without losing prior context, easing migrations and preserving continuity. It reduces migration friction and supports ongoing workflows across models.

Claude 新增记忆导入功能，切换至 Claude 时不丢失先前上下文，降低迁移摩擦并保持工作流连续性。为跨模型工作流提供了更顺畅的迁移体验。

▲ 563 · 💬 261 · AI

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Show HN: I built a sub-500ms latency voice agent from scratch
item.dc:creator: nicktikhonov
item.description:
A self-built voice agent achieves sub-500ms latency end-to-end, with architecture details and benchmarks that illustrate practical latency optimization in real-time AI.

作者自建语音代理，端到端延迟低于 500 ms，并分享架构与基准测试要点，展示在语音 AI 堆栈中压缩延迟的可行路径。

▲ 559 · 💬 152 · Show HN · AI · Programming

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: OpenAI raises $110B on $730B pre-money valuation
item.dc:creator: zlatkov
item.description:
OpenAI raised a staggering $110B in private funding, valuing the company at about $730B pre-money, underscoring the outsized appetite for AI infrastructure and services. The deal amplifies competitive dynamics and incentives for further AI product bets.

OpenAI 完成约 1100 亿美元的私募融资，融资前估值约 7300 亿美元，凸显对 AI 基础设施与服务的强烈市场需求。这笔交易将推动行业竞争格局与后续产品押注。

▲ 557 · 💬 582 · Business · Finance · AI · DevOps

item.title: I built a demo of what AI chat will look like when it's “free” and ad-supported
item.dc:creator: nickk81
item.description:
A demo showcases what a free, ad-supported AI chat could look like in practice, including ad placements and quality tradeoffs. It highlights how monetization pressures can shape model behavior, privacy, and user experience.

一个演示展示了免费、广告支持的 AI 聊天在实际中的样子，涉及广告投放与体验质量的权衡。此类商业模式可能影响模型行为、隐私与用户体验。

item.title: Anthropic ditches its core safety promise
item.dc:creator: motbus3
item.description:
Reports suggest Anthropic is rolling back parts of its safety promises, signaling a shift in how safety is enforced in its products. The move could affect trust, regulatory scrutiny, and risk assessment for AI deployments.

传言称 Anthropic 正在放弃部分核心安全承诺，显示其在产品安全保障上的策略变化。此举可能影响用户信任、监管审查以及对 AI 部署风险的评估。

item.title: I pitched a roller coaster to Disneyland at age 10 in 1978
item.dc:creator: wordglyph
item.description:
A personal anecdote about pitching a Disneyland roller coaster at age 10 in 1978, illustrating early engineering imagination. The story reflects how early ideas foreshadow a long-running interest in design and storytelling.

这是一则关于作者 10 岁时在 1978 年向迪士尼提议过一座过山车的个人趣闻，展现早期对设计与讲故事的热情。故事反映出创意如何从童年想法延续并影响职业兴趣。

item.title: US orders diplomats to fight data sovereignty initiatives
item.dc:creator: colinhb
item.description:
The US is pushing diplomats to push back on data sovereignty laws worldwide, arguing they hinder cross-border data flows and national interests. The move highlights the ongoing policy clash over where data should reside and who can access it.

美国推动外交官抵制全球范围内的数据主权法案，声称此类法规阻碍跨境数据流动并影响国家利益。此举凸显了数据应存放在哪、谁有权访问数据等方面的政策博弈。

▲ 534 · 💬 480 · Politics · Legal

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Get free Claude max 20x for open-source maintainers
item.dc:creator: zhisme
item.description:
Claude is offering a free usage quota of up to 20x for open-source maintainers, supporting community-led projects with access to high-quality AI tooling. This helps OSS teams scale their tooling and experimentation.

Claude 为开源维护者提供最高可达 20 倍的免费使用配额，支持社区驱动项目使用高质量 AI 工具，助力 OSS 团队扩展工具链。

item.title: The Hunt for Dark Breakfast
item.dc:creator: moultano
item.description:
The piece explores a concept called Dark Breakfast, examining hidden or overlooked signals within systems and what defenders can learn from them.

这篇文章探讨了名为 “Dark Breakfast” 的概念，分析隐藏或被忽视的数据信号在系统中的作用以及对防守方的启示。

▲ 532 · 💬 180 · Security

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Decision trees – the unreasonable power of nested decision rules
item.dc:creator: mschnell
item.description:
Nested decision rules let a decision tree encode nuanced logic with transparent paths, but depth can make them unwieldy. With careful structure and pruning, they remain a practical tool for governable, explainable rules even as data-driven models rise.

嵌套决策规则使决策树能够以透明的路径表达细致的逻辑，但深度增加会使其变得难以维护。通过合适的结构和剪枝，它仍然是可解释性强、可治理的规则工具，即便在数据驱动模型盛行时也有用。

▲ 521 · 💬 78 · Data

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: MCP server that reduces Claude Code context consumption by 98%
item.dc:creator: mksglu
item.description:
Describes a server-side MCP approach that slashes Claude Code's context window usage by 98%, enabling longer reasoning or lower hosting costs.

介绍一种服务器端的 MCP 方案，将 Claude Code 的上下文消耗降低约 98%，从而支持更长的推理链路或降低部署成本。

item.title: Croatia declared free of landmines after 31 years
item.dc:creator: toomuchtodo
item.description:
Croatia has been declared landmine-free after 31 years of clearance and monitoring, a milestone for safety and post-conflict recovery with implications for travel, commerce, and regional stability.

克罗地亚在经过长达31年的清理与监测后宣告无地雷区域，这是对安全与战后重建的重要里程碑，将影响旅游、贸易及区域稳定。
